features: Treat your loved one to the Dove Enjoy Duo Gift Set, featuring a luxury shower puff and two Dove products for her
This body wash collection doubles up on the nourishment and fragrance to care for her skin and comfort her senses
Featuring a vibrant, fruity scent, Dove Fruity Nourish Body Wash 225 ml doesn’t strip moisture from her skin but instead helps replenish it from within*
With a soft, fruity scent, Dove Nourishing Body Wash 225 ml gently cleanses her skin and nourishes its microbiome for instantly softer, smoother skin
This set of gifts for her comes complete with a Dove shower puff that takes her showering routine to a new level of relaxation
Perfect for any occasion, these indulgent gifts for women are beautifully packaged in a ready-to-wrap gift box
description: Product Description Know someone who’s into confidence-inspiring natural beauty in a big way? You’ve just found the perfect gifts for her. Dove believes that beauty is not defined by shape, size or colour. It’s about feeling like the best version of yourself. Authentic. Unique. Real. That’s why the Dove Enjoy Duo Gift Set includes a luxury shower puff and two Dove products that transform her daily routine into a caring ritual and leave her feeling naturally beautiful all day. Made with 100% gentle cleansers, plant-based moisturisers and 0% sulfate SLES, Dove Fruity Nourish and Nourishing Body Washes ensure her microbiome (her skin’s living protective layer) is given the nutrients it needs to protect itself and minimise skin dryness. Dove Fruity Nourish Body Wash wraps her in a cloud of rich, fruit-scented lather for an invigorating sensory experience. Dove Nourishing Body Wash produces a soft, creamy lather that effectively washes away impurities and nourishes her skin, leaving it softer and smoother after just one shower. No matter the occasion, help her look and feel her best with this nourishing body wash collection from Dove. It’s the perfect stocking filler, birthday treat or all-year-round gift. Caring for her never felt so good. *within the stratum corneum Ingredients Dove Essentials Hydrate Bodywash 225ml INGREDIENTS: Aqua, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Lauroyl Isethionate, Glycerin, Sodium Benzoate, Parfum, Sodium Chloride, Carbomer, Glycol Distearate, Caprylyl Glycol, Lauric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide, Stearic Acid, Sodium Lauroyl Glycinate, Sodium Isethionate, Palmitic Acid, PPG-6, PEG-150 Pentaerythrityl Tetrastearate, PPG-2 Hydroxyethyl Cocamide, Sodium Gluconate, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Linalool. Dove Essentials Fruity Nourish Bodywash 225ml INGREDIENTS: Aqua, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Lauroyl Isethionate, Glycerin, Sodium Benzoate, Sodium Chloride, Parfum, Carbomer, Caprylyl Glycol, Lauric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide, Stearic Acid, Sodium Lauroyl Glycinate, Glycol Distearate, PEG-150 Pentaerythrityl Tetrastearate, Sodium Isethionate, Palmitic Acid, PPG-6, PPG-2 Hydroxyethyl Cocamide, Sodium Gluconate, Melissa Officinalis Leaf Extract, Citrus Grandis Fruit Extract, Citronellol, Geraniol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Linalool, CI 17200, CI 19140, CI 42090. Directions Wet skin, apply product, lather, rinse, and repeat if necessary. Avoid eye area. Manufacturer Contact Information Unilever Dept ER, Wirral CH63 3JW UK See more
